# hetzner-robot_server_market_products (Data Source)

Lists available Hetzner **server market (auction)** products (`GET /order/server_market/product`). Use a product `id` with `hetzner-robot_server_market_order`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_server_market_products" "auction" {}

output "cheapest" {
  value = [for p in data.hetzner-robot_server_market_products.auction.products : {
    id    = p.id
    price = p.price
    cpu   = p.cpu
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `products` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products))

<a id="nestedatt--products"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products`

Read-Only:

- `arch` (List of String)
- `cpu` (String)
- `cpu_benchmark` (Number)
- `datacenter` (String)
- `description` (List of String)
- `dist` (List of String)
- `fixed_price` (Boolean)
- `hdd_count` (Number)
- `hdd_size` (Number)
- `hdd_text` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `lang` (List of String)
- `memory_size` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `network_speed` (String)
- `next_reduce` (Number)
- `price` (String)
- `traffic` (String)
